_note: External-forecast import template. Values are in the chart's DISPLAY units: q/q annualised % for growth/inflation (GDPH, JGDP), the level in % for rates (POLRATE). Each becomes a SOFT condition — the trust slider in the External forecasts panel sets how tightly it binds (100% = exact pin). Quarters are labelled YYYYQn and must fall inside the forecast horizon (the first forecast quarter is the one AFTER the panel's last history quarter). Import via ControlPanel → External forecasts → Import forecasts.
